mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category_hierarchy (parent_category_id, child_category_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{childId}, #{sortOrder}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT ch.child_category_id FROM category_hierarchy ch JOIN steering_category sc ON sc.id = ch.child_category_id WHERE ch.parent_category_id = #{parentId} AND sc.enabled = TRUE AND sc.deleted = FALSE

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT child_category_id FROM category_hierarchy WHERE parent_category_id = #{rootId} UNION ALL SELECT ch.child_category_id FROM category_hierarchy ch JOIN descendants d ON ch.parent_category_id = d.child_category_id ) SELECT child_category_id FROM descendants
